name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.SnapFloor
summary: Exaggeration amount of the impact with the floor after falling off of car +ve fold with floor impact (as if pushed at hips in the impact normal direction).  -ve fold away from car impact.
remarks:
Default value = 7.0f.
            Min value = -20.0f.
            Max value = 20.0f.
